metadata.title: Kristin
metadata.description: Discover movies and TV shows through community-driven recommendations.

home.title: Kristin
home.subtitle: Discover your next favorite movie or show through community-powered recommendations.
home.step1Desc: Find any movie or TV show. Build your watchlist and track what you've seen.
home.step2Desc: Real people suggest what to watch next. The best picks rise to the top through community votes.
home.step3Desc: Share your opinion with half-star precision. Help others decide what's worth watching.
home.joinTitle: Ready to discover your next favorite?
home.joinSubtitle: Join the community and start getting personalized recommendations.

common.footerTagline: Community-driven movie and TV show recommendations.

consent.title: We use cookies
consent.description: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. With your permission, we also use marketing cookies for ads. You can change your choice anytime.

cookie.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how you use it.
cookie.essentialDesc: These cookies are required for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.
cookie.essentialAuth: Authentication cookies — keep you logged in across sessions (managed by Supabase).
cookie.essentialLocale: Locale cookie — remembers your preferred language.
cookie.essentialConsent: Consent cookie — stores your cookie preference choice.
cookie.analyticsDesc: We use Vercel Web Analytics, which is privacy-friendly and does not use cookies. It collects anonymous, aggregated data about page views and performance. No personal information is tracked.
cookie.marketingDesc: If you accept marketing cookies, third-party ad networks may set cookies to show you relevant ads. These cookies are only set after you give explicit consent. We do not sell your personal data.
cookie.manageDesc: You can clear your cookies at any time through your browser settings. Clearing cookies will reset your consent choice and you will be prompted again on your next visit.

privacy.introDesc: Kristin is a community-driven media recommendation platform. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal information.
privacy.collectDesc: We collect the following types of information:
privacy.collectAccount: Account information — email address and password (hashed) when you create an account. Optional profile details like display name and bio.
privacy.collectContent: User-generated content — reviews, ratings, suggestions, and list items you create.
privacy.collectUsage: Usage data — anonymous page views and performance metrics via Vercel Web Analytics (no personal data, no cookies).
privacy.useProvide: Provide and maintain the service — authenticate you, display your content, and personalize your experience.
privacy.useImprove: Improve the platform — understand usage patterns through anonymous analytics to make the product better.
privacy.useCommunicate: Communicate with you — send essential account-related emails (confirmation, password reset).
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use the following third-party services to operate:
privacy.thirdPartySupabase: Supabase — database hosting and authentication. Your account data and content are stored on Supabase servers.
privacy.thirdPartyVercel: Vercel — hosting and analytics. Vercel Web Analytics collects anonymous, aggregated data without cookies.
privacy.thirdPartyTmdb: TMDB (The Movie Database) — movie and TV show data. We send search queries to TMDB's API. No personal information is shared.
privacy.rightsDesc: Under GDPR and similar privacy regulations, you have the following rights:
privacy.rightsAccess: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rightsCorrect: Correction — update or correct inaccurate personal data.
privacy.rightsDelete: Deletion — request that we delete your account and associated data.
privacy.rightsExport: Data portability — request your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.retentionDesc: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will remove your personal data within 30 days. Anonymous, aggregated analytics data may be retained indefinitely.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this privacy policy or want to exercise your rights, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or contact us through the platform.

terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing or using Kristin, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must be at least 13 years old to create an account. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.contentDesc: You retain ownership of content you create (reviews, suggestions, ratings). By posting content, you grant Kristin a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display and distribute that content as part of the service. You may delete your content at any time.
terms.conductSpam: Post spam, fake reviews, or misleading suggestions.
terms.conductAbuse: Harass, threaten, or abuse other users.
terms.tmdbDesc: Movie and TV show data is provided by TMDB. This data is subject to TMDB's own terms of use. Kristin is not responsible for the accuracy of third-party data.
terms.terminationDesc: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Kristin is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure. Recommendations are community-generated opinions and should not be taken as professional advice.
terms.changesDesc: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email.
